List of Keywords
Cheque dishonoured; Source of funds; Financial capacity of the 
complainant; Onus not on the complainant; Legally enforceable 
debt; Stop payment; Payment stopped by drawer; Drawer of 
the cheque; Not arrayed as a party; Signatory of the cheque; 
Person in charge of the Partnership Firm; Arrayed as accused; 
Returned  un-encashed; Cheque lost; Return of money; Re-
payment; Signatory of the cheque; Statutory notice; Statutory 
presumption.
